swahili.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Kipengele cha ubadilishaji = uwiano sawa na 1 (mf., 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Kuzidisha kwacho hubadilisha kipimo bila kubadilisha thamani. Viambishi vya SI (kilo, mili) ni nguvu za 10 — sogeza tu nukta ya desimali.
swahili.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: Urefu, uzani, ujazo, joto, muda, nishati, shinikizo. Kanuni pekee muhimu: fuatilia vipimo katika kila hatua. Ikiwa jibu lako la mwisho liko katika m² ilhali ulitaka sekunde, umefanya kosa mahali fulani juu.
swahili.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Mabadiliko ya kila siku (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) pamoja na vipimo vya AP / SAT / maabara. Kila swali huonyesha kipengele cha ubadilishaji baada ya kujibu ili ujenge kumbukumbu ya misuli.
swahili.word_problem_apply_in_context: Tatizo la maneno — tumia katika muktadha
swahili.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Hali halisi za ubadilishaji vipimo: matumizi ya mafuta, kupima mapishi, hesabu za kipimo cha dawa, makadirio ya umbali wa safari. Matatizo ya maneno ni 80% ufahamu wa kusoma + 20% hisabati ya ubadilishaji.
swahili.magnitude_orders_of_magnitude_discover: Ukubwa — ugunduzi wa daraja za ukubwa
swahili.every_si_prefix_is_a_power_of_10_slide: Kila kiambishi cha SI ni nguvu ya 10. Sogeza vipeo vya chanzo na lengo ili uhisi jinsi mizani ilivyo mbali kweli — ujuzi muhimu nyuma ya nukuu ya kisayansi na makadirio ya Fermi.
swahili.test_your_unit_conversion_knowledge: Jaribu ujuzi wako wa ubadilishaji vipimo!
swahili.22_questions_speed_bonus_streak_reward: Maswali 22 • Bonasi ya kasi • Zawadi za mfululizo
swahili.question: 🧠 Swali
swahili.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: Bofya Tengeneza kwa tatizo la maneno lililotengenezwa na AI
swahili.2_orders_of_magnitude_close_cousins_cm: <2 daraja za ukubwa — jamaa wa karibu (cm→m).
swahili.5_8_oom_biology_to_geology_scales: 5-8 OOM — mizani kutoka biolojia hadi jiolojia.
swahili.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Rekebisha vipeo vya chanzo na lengo (10^N). Kifaa huainisha mabadiliko ya ukubwa katika bendi 5 tofauti. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo.
swahili.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Dhana: Ni mifano ipi ya ulimwengu halisi inayofunika kila bendi ya ukubwa?
swahili.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Linganisha cm→km, mm→mwaka wa mwanga. Kila kimoja OOM ngapi?
swahili.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Kwa nini wanasayansi hufunzwa daraja za ukubwa?
swahili.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Naelewa — eleza kwa maneno yako mwenyewe
swahili.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: Eleza kwa nini hoja za vipimo katika OOM nyingi ni ngumu.
swahili.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Dokezo la muundo: kialamisho cha ukubwa tofauti cha hali 5; hakuna alama ya kosa; hakuna ufunuo — kwa makusudi.
swahili.metric_prefixes_powers_of_10_from_atom: 🔬 Viambishi vya Mita — Nguvu za 10 kutoka atomi hadi galaksi

somali.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Saamiga beddelka = saami u dhigma 1 (tusaale, 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Ku dhufashadiisu waxay beddeshaa cutubka iyada oo aan la beddelin qiimaha. Horgalayaasha SI (kilo, milli) waa awoodaha 10 — kaliya dhaqaaji barta jajabka.
somali.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: Dherer, cufnaan, mug, heerkul, waqti, tamar, cadaadis. Xeerka kaliya ee muhiimka ah: la soco cutubyada tallaabo kasta. Haddii jawaabtaada ugu dambeysa ay tahay m² markaad rabtay ilbiriqsi, meel sare ayaad ka qaldantay.
somali.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Beddelka maalin kasta (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) iyo cabbiraadaha AP / SAT / shaybaarka. Su'aal kasta waxay tusinaysaa saamiga beddelka kadib jawaabta si aad u dhisto xusuusta muruqyada.
somali.word_problem_apply_in_context: Dhibaato eray — ku dabaqid macnaha guud
somali.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Xaalado dhab ah oo beddelka cutubyada: isticmaalka shidaalka, cabbiridda cuntada, xisaabinta qiyaasta daawada, qiyaasta masaafada safarka. Dhibaatooyinka erayga waa 80% faham akhriska + 20% xisaabta beddelka.
somali.every_si_prefix_is_a_power_of_10_slide: Horgale kasta oo SI waa awood 10. Dhaqaaji jibbaarrada isha iyo bartilmaameedka si aad u dareento sida cabbiraadyadu ay runtii u kala fog yihiin — xirfadda muhiimka ah ee ka dambeysa qoraalka sayniska iyo qiyaasaha Fermi.
somali.question: 🧠 Su'aal
somali.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: Guji Abuur si aad u hesho dhibaato eray oo AI abuuray
somali.5_8_oom_biology_to_geology_scales: 5-8 OOM — cabbiro laga bilaabo bayoolaji ilaa joolaji.
somali.9_12_oom_micro_to_macro_span: 9-12 OOM — kala duwanaansho laga bilaabo mikro ilaa makro.
somali.13_oom_atomic_to_cosmic: 13+ OOM — laga bilaabo atom ilaa caalam.
somali.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Hagaaji jibbaarrada isha iyo bartilmaameedka (10^N). Qalabku wuxuu u kala saaraa isbeddelka baaxadda 5 baandood oo kala duwan. Dhibco ma jiraan, daaha ma jiro.
somali.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Mala-awaal: Tusaalooyinka dhabta ah ee daboola baand kasta oo baaxad?
somali.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Isbarbardhig cm→km, mm→sannad-iftiin. Mid kasta immisa OOM?
somali.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Maxay saynisyahannada loogu tababaraa heerarka baaxadda?
somali.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: Sharax sababta caqli-galnimada cabbirka ee OOM badan u adag tahay.
somali.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Qoraal naqshadeed: calaamad baaxad oo kala duwan oo 5 xaaladood; dhibco khalad ma jiraan; daaha ma jiro — ula kac.
somali.metric_prefixes_powers_of_10_from_atom: 🔬 Horgalayaasha Mitirka — Awoodaha 10 laga bilaabo atomyada ilaa galaxiyada

hausa.convert_the_math_behind_units: Canza — lissafin da ke bayan ma'auni
hausa.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Adadin canzawa = rabo daidai da 1 (misali, 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Ninka shi yana canza ma'auni ba tare da canza ƙima ba. Gabatattun SI (kilo, milli) ƙarfin 10 ne — kawai ka matsa digon decimal.
hausa.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: Tsawo, nauyi, girma, zafin jiki, lokaci, makamashi, matsi. Dokar kaɗai mai muhimmanci: bi diddigin ma'auni a kowane mataki. Idan amsarka ta ƙarshe tana cikin m² alhali kana son daƙiƙa, ka yi kuskure wani wuri a sama.
hausa.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Canje-canjen yau da kullum (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) da ma'aunan AP / SAT / dakin gwaje-gwaje. Kowace tambaya tana nuna adadin canzawa bayan amsa don ka gina ƙwaƙwalwar tsoka.
hausa.word_problem_apply_in_context: Matsalar kalma — aiwatar a cikin mahallin
hausa.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Yanayoyin canza ma'auni na ainihin duniya: amfani da man fetur, daidaita girke-girke, lissafin kashi, kimanta nisan tafiya. Matsalolin kalma sune 80% fahimtar karatu + 20% lissafin canzawa.
hausa.every_si_prefix_is_a_power_of_10_slide: Kowane gabatarwar SI ƙarfin 10 ne. Motsa masu ƙarfin tushe da na manufa don jin yadda sikeli suke da nisa da gaske — fasaha ta tushe a bayan rubutun kimiyya da ƙididdigar Fermi.
hausa.question: 🧠 Tambaya
hausa.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: Danna Ƙirƙira don matsalar kalma da AI ya ƙirƙira
hausa.5_8_oom_biology_to_geology_scales: 5-8 OOM — sikeli daga ilimin halitta zuwa ilimin ƙasa.
hausa.13_oom_atomic_to_cosmic: 13+ OOM — daga atom zuwa sararin samaniya.
hausa.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Daidaita masu ƙarfin tushe da na manufa (10^N). Na'urar tana rarraba canjin girma zuwa makada 5 daban-daban. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Hasashe: Wadanne misalan ainihin duniya ne suke rufe kowace makadar girma?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Kwatanta cm→km, mm→shekarar haske. Kowanne OOM nawa?
hausa.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Me ya sa ake horar da masana kimiyya a matakan girma?
hausa.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: Bayyana dalilin da ya sa tunanin girma a kan OOM da yawa yake da wahala.
hausa.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Bayanin ƙira: alamar girma daban ta yanayi 5; babu makin kuskure; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
hausa.metric_prefixes_powers_of_10_from_atom: 🔬 Gabatattun Awo — Ƙarfin 10 daga atom zuwa taurari

yoruba.convert_the_math_behind_units: Yí padà — ìṣirò tó wà lẹ́yìn àwọn ìwọ̀n
yoruba.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Òṣùwọ̀n ìyípadà = ìpín tó dọ́gba pẹ̀lú 1 (bíi, 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Ìsodipúpọ̀ pẹ̀lú rẹ̀ yí ìwọ̀n padà láìyí iye padà. Àwọn ìṣáájú SI (kilo, milli) jẹ́ agbára 10 — kàn gbé àmì dẹ́ṣímà.
yoruba.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: Gígùn, ìwúwo, ìwọ̀n-àyè, ìgbóná, àkókò, agbára, ìfúnpá. Òfin kan ṣoṣo tó ṣe pàtàkì: tọpa àwọn ìwọ̀n ní ìgbésẹ̀ kọ̀ọ̀kan. Bí ìdáhùn ìkẹyìn rẹ bá wà ní m² nígbà tí o fẹ́ ìṣẹ́jú-àáyá, o ti ṣe àṣìṣe níbìkan lókè.
yoruba.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Àwọn ìyípadà ojoojúmọ́ (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) pẹ̀lú àwọn òṣùwọ̀n AP / SAT / yàrá-ìṣèwádìí. Ìbéèrè kọ̀ọ̀kan máa ń fi òṣùwọ̀n ìyípadà hàn lẹ́yìn ìdáhùn kí o lè kọ́ ìrántí iṣan.
yoruba.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Àwọn ipò ìyípadà ìwọ̀n ayé gidi: lílo epo, àtúnṣe òṣùwọ̀n oúnjẹ, ìṣirò ìwọ̀n òògùn, àfojúsùn ọ̀nà ìrìnàjò. Àwọn ìṣòro ọ̀rọ̀ jẹ́ 80% òye kíkà + 20% ìṣirò ìyípadà.
yoruba.every_si_prefix_is_a_power_of_10_slide: Gbogbo ìṣáájú SI jẹ́ agbára 10. Gbé àwọn agbára orísun àti àfojúsùn láti ní ìmọ̀lára bí àwọn òṣùwọ̀n ṣe jìnnà gan-an — ọgbọ́n pàtàkì tó wà lẹ́yìn àkọsílẹ̀ sáyẹ́ǹsì àti àfojúsùn Fermi.
yoruba.test_your_unit_conversion_knowledge: Dán ìmọ̀ ìyípadà ìwọ̀n rẹ wò!
yoruba.22_questions_speed_bonus_streak_reward: Ìbéèrè 22 • Èrè ìyára • Àwọn èrè ọ̀wọ́
yoruba.question: 🧠 Ìbéèrè
yoruba.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: Tẹ Ṣẹ̀dá fún ìṣòro ọ̀rọ̀ tí AI ṣẹ̀dá
yoruba.5_8_oom_biology_to_geology_scales: 5-8 OOM — òṣùwọ̀n láti ẹ̀kọ́ ẹ̀dá sí ẹ̀kọ́ ilẹ̀.
yoruba.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Ṣàtúnṣe àwọn agbára orísun àti àfojúsùn (10^N). Ẹ̀rọ náà ṣe ìpín ìyípadà ìwọ̀n-títóbi sí ẹgbẹ́ 5 ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀. Kò sí àmì, kò sí ìfihàn.
yoruba.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Àbá: Àwọn àpẹẹrẹ ayé gidi wo ni ó bo ẹgbẹ́ ìwọ̀n-títóbi kọ̀ọ̀kan?
yoruba.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 O dí — fi àwọn ìbéèrè ṣíṣí hàn
yoruba.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Fi cm→km, mm→ọdún-ìmọ́lẹ̀ wéra. OOM mélòó ni ọ̀kọ̀ọ̀kan?
yoruba.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Kí nìdí tí a fi ń kọ́ àwọn onímọ̀ sáyẹ́ǹsì ní àwọn ìtàkùn ìwọ̀n-títóbi?
yoruba.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Mo ti yé — ṣàlàyé ní ọ̀rọ̀ ara rẹ
yoruba.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: Ṣàlàyé ìdí tí ìmọ̀ràn ìwọ̀n kọjá ọ̀pọ̀ OOM fi nira.
yoruba.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Àkọsílẹ̀ àpẹẹrẹ: àmì ìwọ̀n-títóbi ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀ ipò 5; kò sí àmì àṣìṣe; kò sí ìfihàn — láfọ̀ọ̀mọ̀.
yoruba.metric_prefixes_powers_of_10_from_atom: 🔬 Àwọn Ìṣáájú Mítà — Agbára 10 láti átọ́mù sí ìṣùpọ̀-ìràwọ̀

igbo.convert_the_math_behind_units: Tụgharịa — mgbakọ na mwepụ dị n'azụ otu
igbo.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Ihe ntụgharị = oke hà nhata 1 (dịka, 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Ịba ya na-agbanwe otu n'agbanweghị uru. Ihe mmalite SI (kilo, milli) bụ ike nke 10 — naanị bugharịa akara decimal.
igbo.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: Ogologo, oke, olu, okpomọkụ, oge, ike, nrụgide. Naanị iwu dị mkpa: soro otu n'usoro ọ bụla. Ọ bụrụ na azịza ikpeazụ gị dị na m² mgbe ị chọrọ sekọnd, ị mehiere ebe ụfọdụ n'elu.
igbo.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Ntụgharị kwa ụbọchị (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) gụnyere nha AP / SAT / ụlọ nyocha. Ajụjụ ọ bụla na-egosi ihe ntụgharị mgbe azịza gasịrị ka i wuo ncheta akwara.
igbo.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Ọnọdụ ntụgharị otu nke ụwa n'ezie: oriri mmanụ, ịhazi usoro nri, mgbako ọ́gwụ, atụmatụ anya njem. Nsogbu okwu bụ 80% nghọta ọgụgụ + 20% mgbakọ ntụgharị.
igbo.magnitude_orders_of_magnitude_discover: Ịdị ukwuu — nchọpụta usoro ịdị ukwuu
igbo.every_si_prefix_is_a_power_of_10_slide: Ihe mmalite SI ọ bụla bụ ike nke 10. Bugharịa ihe ike isi mmalite na ebumnuche ka ị nwee mmetụta otú ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ si dịpụ n'ezie — nka bụ isi dị n'azụ edemede sayensị na atụmatụ Fermi.
igbo.test_your_unit_conversion_knowledge: Nwalee ihe ọmụma ntụgharị otu gị!
igbo.question: 🧠 Ajụjụ
igbo.get_a_hint_from_ai: Nweta ntụ aka site na AI
igbo.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: Pịa Mepụta maka nsogbu okwu nke AI mepụtara
igbo.2_orders_of_magnitude_close_cousins_cm: <2 usoro ịdị ukwuu — ndị ikwu nso (cm→m).
igbo.5_8_oom_biology_to_geology_scales: 5-8 OOM — scale site na bayoloji ruo jioloji.
igbo.9_12_oom_micro_to_macro_span: 9-12 OOM — site na mikro ruo makro.
igbo.13_oom_atomic_to_cosmic: 13+ OOM — site na atọm ruo eluigwe.
igbo.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Hazie ihe ike isi mmalite na ebumnuche (10^N). Ngwa na-ekewa mgbanwe ịdị ukwuu n'ime ìgwè 5 dị iche. Enweghị akara, enweghị ngosi.
igbo.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Echiche: Kedu ihe atụ ụwa n'ezie na-ekpuchi ìgwè ịdị ukwuu ọ bụla?
igbo.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ị rapaara — gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Tụnyere cm→km, mm→afọ ìhè. Nke ọ bụla OOM ole?
igbo.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Gịnị mere e ji azụ ndị sayensị n'usoro ịdị ukwuu?
igbo.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke gị
igbo.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: Kọwaa ihe mere echiche akụkụ gafee ọtụtụ OOM ji sie ike.
igbo.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Ndetu imewe: akara ịdị ukwuu dị iche nke ọnọdụ 5; enweghị akara njehie; enweghị ngosi — n'ụzọ ezubere.
igbo.metric_prefixes_powers_of_10_from_atom: 🔬 Ihe Mmalite Mita — Ike nke 10 site na atọm ruo ụyọkọ kpakpando
